andrew-mateljan.flyerTitle: Founder & Academy Director · ATP/WTA Tour Coach · LBHS Head Coach
andrew-mateljan.flyerBio: Ranked #3 in SoCal and #12 nationally as a junior. Competed professionally, then spent seven years coaching across Spain, Croatia, and Norway. Currently coaches Karue Sell (#268 ATP) and has coached at Masters 1000 events on the professional tour. Has placed junior players at colleges across all divisions — including South Carolina, Yale, and Cornell. Founder of Fit4Tennis, serving 100K+ users worldwide.

robert-lebuhn.flyerTitle: Director of Tennis Operations · NCAA Division I · USPTR Certified · 4x Coach of the Year
robert-lebuhn.flyerBio: Played Division I tennis at Lafayette College. Twenty-five years coaching every age and every level since. Runs daily operations and is usually the first person you'll talk to. LBHS Associate Head Coach.

peter-defrantz.flyerBio: Competed on the top-ranked collegiate team in Southern California. Eight years coaching juniors, adults, and competitive players. Brings technical precision and a steady presence that makes the game feel simpler than it did an hour ago.

allison-cronk.flyerTitle: Director of Youth Development · Collegiate Player · Educator
allison-cronk.flyerBio: Two-time collegiate player and Dean's List graduate with a background in education. Makes a three-year-old forget they're learning and a ten-year-old realize they can compete. If your child's first tennis experience is with Allison, they'll want to come back.
